items.title: ChatGPT-5.4 is OpenAI’s fastest model yet — 7 prompts that show what it can really do

items.title: Vibe Check: GPT-5.4—OpenAI Is Back
items.summary: Claude Code had captured developers' hearts, and Opus 4.5 was shipping at a level other models couldn't touch. Meanwhile, OpenAI's coding agent Codex felt like it was built for an older era of coding with AI. It was precise but rigid, powerful but personality-less, and not good with tools or able to run for long periods of time autonomously. OpenAI's latest model release, GPT-5.4—along with their other recent releases GPT-5.3 Codex, GPT-5.3 Codex Spark, and the Codex desktop app shifts the competitive balance back towards OpenAI on the coding front.

items.title: 阿里开源 AI 沙箱平台：一套 SDK 搞定 Coding Agent、GUI Agent、RL 训练全场景_哔哩哔哩_bilibili
items.summary: AI Agent 开发最大的痛点是什么？安全。让大模型执行代码、操作浏览器、控制手机，一不小心就出事。阿里开源的 AgentScope Runtime 用 Docker 沙箱彻底解决了这个问题。 一套 SDK 统一六大沙箱：Python、Shell、GUI、浏览器、文件系统、手机。pip install 一行搞定安装，三行代码创建隔离环境，Agent 怎么折腾都不影响主机。 更牛的是它不绑定框架，LangGraph、AutoGen、微软 Agent Framework 都能直接接入。今年 1 月 v1.0 发布，2 月就迭代到 v1.1，新增异步沙箱和分布式中断服务，迭代速度很快。 GitHub 仓库：agentscope-ai/agentscope-runtime 追新不盲从，实测出真知。

items.title: Claude Code deletes developers' production setup, including its database and snapshots — 2.5 years of records were nuked in an instant | Tom's Hardware
items.summary: In the post-mortem, Gregory describes a few measures he's taking to avoid similar incidents in the future, including setting up a period test for database restoring, applying delete protections to Terraform and AWS permissions, and moving the Terraform state file to S3 storage instead of his local machine. He also admitted he "over-relied on the AI agent to run Terraform commands", and is now stopping the agent from doing so, and will manually review every plan Claude presents so he can run any destructive actions himself.
